tasks.title: GATE.S9.SYSTEMIC.OFFER_GEN.001: Generate mission offers from world-state triggers

tasks.title: GATE.S9.SYSTEMIC.TRIGGER_ENGINE.001: World-state mission trigger detection
tasks.intent: Add SystemicMissionSystem: detect world conditions for procedural mission generation. 3 trigger types: WAR_DEMAND (warfront goods shortage at contested nodes), PRICE_SPIKE (good price > 2x base), SUPPLY_SHORTAGE (production < 50% near instability). Emit SystemicMissionOffer per trigger. Configurable thresholds via SystemicMissionTweaksV0. Wire into SimKernel.Step.

If evidence is missing or tests fail, escalate via DEFAULT.

tasks.title: GATE.S7.COMBAT_PHASE2.BATTLE_STATIONS.001: Battle stations state machine
tasks.intent: BattleStations state on Fleet: STAND_DOWN (default) -> SPINNING_UP (N-tick timer) -> BATTLE_READY. ToggleBattleStations command. StrategicResolverV0 gates weapon effectiveness: STAND_DOWN=25%, SPINNING_UP=50%, READY=100% damage multiplier. Spin-up ticks configurable via CombatTweaksV0.
constraints: Single-session scope: stay within evidence and expected touch paths.
If evidence is missing or tests fail, escalate via DEFAULT.

escalation_rules.note: Escalate if blocked or scope expands.

tasks.title: GATE.S7.COMBAT_PHASE2.HEAT_SYSTEM.001: Heat accumulation + overheat cascade
tasks.intent: Heat model on CombatProfile: HeatCurrent, HeatCapacity (default 1000), HeatPerShot per weapon, RejectionRate (passive cooling/tick). StrategicResolverV0 accumulates heat on fire, reduces by RejectionRate each round. Overheat: >capacity = 50% fire rate, >2x capacity = weapon lockout. Int-based fixed-point. CombatTweaksV0 heat constants.
constraints: Single-session scope: stay within evidence and expected touch paths.
If evidence is missing or tests fail, escalate via DEFAULT.
